STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_PLANT.title: Planting
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_PLANT.description: At the start of next turn, gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold].

STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_STRESS.title: Stress
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_STRESS.description: When you gain resources, spend 1 Stress to double that gain.

STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_STRENGTH.title: Strength
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_STRENGTH.descripti: Strength increases damage dealt by Attack cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_PLATING.title: Plating
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_PLATING.descriptio: Gain Block at the end of your turn. [gold]Plating[/gold] loses [blue]1[/blue] stack at the start of your turn.

STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_MATERIAL.title: Material
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_CRAFT.title: Craft
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_CRAFT.description: Based on how many [gold]Materials[/gold] you have, show the options, spend the matching [gold]Materials[/gold], and [gold]choose[/gold] a card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
STS2_WINE_FOX_KEYWORD_EXCHANGE.descripti:
Common = Cobblestone, Uncommon = Iron Ingot
Rare = Diamond, Curse/Status = Plank
